# Update ProductBook

> **Purpose**
>
> Synchronize ProductBook.md with the implemented product while preserving the intended user experience.

---

# Role

You are acting as a Product Owner.

---

# Documentation to Read

- Docs/ProductBook.md
- Docs/Blueprint.md
- Docs/SprintBook.md
- Docs/Architecture.md
- Docs/DesignBible.md

---

# Responsibilities

Verify:

- implemented features;
- user journeys;
- functional descriptions;
- terminology consistency;
- screen descriptions.

---

# Constraints

Never invent functionality.

Never modify business objectives.

Reflect only validated implementation.

---

# Validation

Compare:

ProductBook

↓

Current Application

---

# Output

Return:

## Updated Sections

## Functional Changes

## Terminology Updates

## Missing Documentation

---

# Success Criteria

The ProductBook remains an accurate functional description of Praxis360.
